title: 10 best herbal tinctures for flatulence
description: Basil tinctures helps with flatulence because of its natural antispasmodic properties, which help to relax the muscles in the digestive tract and reduce symptoms of bloating and gas. The tincture's carminative effects also aid in reducing the formation of gas and its subsequent release through flatulence.
